Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Process steps Start Event Task A Receive Customer Request Gateway Check Request Type If Type Standard Task B1 Perform Standard Validation Gateway Run Parallel Checks Task C1 Credit Check Task C2 Inventory Check Join Task D Calculate Delivery Date If Type Custom Task B2 Perform Custom Feasibility Analysis Gateway Is Customization Feasible If Yes Task E1 Prepare Custom Quotation If No Task E2 Send Rejection Notice End Event

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Then Gateway Is Approval Needed If Yes Task F Obtain Manager Approval Gateway Is Approval Granted If Yes Task G Generate Final Invoice If No Task H Re evaluate Conditions Loop back to Task E1 for Custom Path or Task D for Standard Path If No Approval Needed Task G Generate Final Invoice Then Task I Send Confirmation to Customer End Event
